title: Northwind Supper Club
html:
Northwind Supper Club
  • Menu
  • Cellar
  • Contact

An eight-course supper, twice a week

Seatings are released on the first Monday of each month and tend to go within the hour.

Dietary requirements can be noted when you book; the kitchen adapts every course.

From the kitchen

Our tasting menu changes with the season. Click here to see what is on this month.

From the cellar

ProducerRegionYearGlass
Domaine PerrotLoire2021£9
Keller & SohnRheinhessen2019£12
Quinta do ValeDouro2018£11

to list

add to list

add to list

Book a table

Fields marked in red are required.

Supper notes

A short letter each month: what is coming in, and when seatings open.

Northwind Supper Club, 14 Harbour Lane. A fixture app; nothing here is a real business.

ariaSnapshot:
- banner:
  - text: Northwind Supper Club
  - navigation:
    - list:
      - listitem:
        - link "Menu":
          - /url: "#menu"
      - listitem:
        - link "Cellar":
          - /url: "#cellar"
      - listitem:
        - link "Contact":
          - /url: "#contact"
- main:
  - heading "An eight-course supper, twice a week" [level=1]
  - img "Fans celebrating a football victory in a packed stadium"
  - paragraph: Seatings are released on the first Monday of each month and tend to go within the hour.
  - paragraph: Dietary requirements can be noted when you book; the kitchen adapts every course.
  - heading "From the kitchen" [level=3]
  - img
  - img "Opening hours"
  - paragraph:
    - text: Our tasting menu changes with the season.
    - link "Click here":
      - /url: "#menu-detail"
    - text: to see what is on this month.
  - heading "From the cellar" [level=2]
  - table:
    - rowgroup:
      - row "Producer Region Year Glass":
        - columnheader "Producer"
        - columnheader "Region"
        - columnheader "Year"
        - columnheader "Glass"
    - rowgroup:
      - row "Domaine Perrot Loire 2021 £9":
        - cell "Domaine Perrot"
        - cell "Loire"
        - cell "2021"
        - cell "£9"
      - row "Keller & Sohn Rheinhessen 2019 £12":
        - cell "Keller & Sohn"
        - cell "Rheinhessen"
        - cell "2019"
        - cell "£12"
      - row "Quinta do Vale Douro 2018 £11":
        - cell "Quinta do Vale"
        - cell "Douro"
        - cell "2018"
        - cell "£11"
  - paragraph:
    - button "One more bottle of Domaine Perrot": +
    - button "Add Domaine Perrot to my list": Add
    - text: to list
  - paragraph:
    - button "Add Keller und Sohn to my list": +
    - text: add to list
  - paragraph:
    - button "Add Quinta do Vale to my list": +
    - text: add to list
  - heading "Book a table" [level=2]
  - paragraph: Fields marked in red are required.
  - textbox "Email address"
  - text: Number of guests
  - combobox "Number of guests":
    - option "2" [selected]
    - option "4"
    - option "6"
  - button "Request a seating"
  - heading "Supper notes" [level=2]
  - paragraph: "A short letter each month: what is coming in, and when seatings open."
  - button "Join the list"
- contentinfo:
  - paragraph: Northwind Supper Club, 14 Harbour Lane. A fixture app; nothing here is a real business.
